title: Friday Sermon 23 November 1990
description:
The Gulf Crisis & the New World Order: The Quranic Command of Holding Fast to the 'Rope of Allah'.

The whole world witnessed The invasion of Iraq and annexation of Kuwait on 2 August 1990. The following day, the Caliph and head of the Ahmadiyya Community began a series of 17 sermons on this issue. The Caliph unmasks the injustices and double standards of both Eastern and Western nations. 

The text http://www.alislam.org/urdu/sermon/FST19901123-UR.pdf
English translation http://www.alislam.org/library/books/newworldorder/?page=121
